# 1215-vps bootstrap state (auto-generated)

## Verified working (2026-04-21)

- 14 containers running, all healthy
- n8n owner auto-created, 7 workflows imported, 6 webhooks active,
  2 credentials loaded (Postgres + MinIO)
- Open WebUI admin auto-created, 2 pipe functions active
  (prototype_n8n_pipe, prototype_comfyui_pipe)
- Paperclip `orchestrator-ceo` company active
  (id 777dd298-833e-46c6-8a30-d01e0bd65d5c, prefix ORC)
- Broker continuity plane confirmed end-to-end via webhook smoke
- ComfyUI reachable (CPU mode, 568 node types, 33GB available)
- `./bin/1215 smoke` PASSES (exposure + canary + gate_shared_core)

## Access (SSH-tunnel or Tailscale)

All services bound to 127.0.0.1 on the VPS. Reach them via one of:

(a) SSH tunnel from laptop (pick any unused local ports):
    ssh -N \
      -L 25678:127.0.0.1:5678 \
      -L 28080:127.0.0.1:8080 \
      -L 23000:127.0.0.1:3000 \
      -L 23100:127.0.0.1:3100 \
      root@148.230.95.154
    Then: http://127.0.0.1:28080 (OWU), :25678 (n8n), :23000 (Langfuse),
          :23100 (Paperclip)

(b) Tailscale (when an auth key is supplied; Phase 6 pending)

## Credentials (auto-generated by init_env.py + bootstrap scripts)

Live values are in /opt/1215-vps/stack/prototype-local/.env (chmod 600).
To retrieve:
    grep -E '^(N8N_OWNER|OPEN_WEBUI_ADMIN)' stack/prototype-local/.env

## Pending (requires human-in-the-loop)

- OPENROUTER_API_KEY  -> blocks hermes-zero install (./bin/1215 seed-hermes)
- LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY / LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY  -> blocks single-trace E2E
  via Langfuse; needs Langfuse UI -> project -> keys
- OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY  -> needed for
  OWU to actually answer prompts with a model
- Tailscale auth key  -> blocks Phase 6 (tailnet + Caddy internal TLS)

## Observations (not touching)

- Donna's hermes-gateway.service failed ~44min ago with provider-side
  RemoteProtocolError from api.featherless.ai/v1. This is upstream
  (provider dropped the stream mid-tool-call). Restart with:
      systemctl --user restart hermes-gateway.service
  Unrelated to our 1215-vps bootstrap work.

## Repo-level patch applied (needs commit)

stack/prototype-local/scripts/bootstrap_n8n.py

  Fixed EACCES failures in import_credentials() and import_workflows():
  NamedTemporaryFile / TemporaryDirectory default to 0o600/0o700 on
  Linux; n8n runs as non-root in the container and cannot read them.
  Added explicit chmod 0644/0755 + an in-container `chmod -R a+rX`
  after compose cp. Patched on VPS; laptop copy updated; not committed.

## Next useful steps

1. Add the missing API keys above to stack/prototype-local/.env and
   re-run `./bin/1215 smoke` to confirm still green.
2. `./bin/1215 seed-hermes` to install the hermes-zero tier-0 agent.
3. Open OWU in browser, log in, select "Prototype n8n Pipe" as the
   model, send a message -> should call the prototype-postgres-tables
   webhook and round-trip. That's the minimal OWU -> n8n -> broker
   proof with no LLM required.
4. Tailscale (Phase 6) when an auth key is available.
5. Commit bootstrap_n8n.py permission fix (upstream repo).
